name: finetune
title: FineTune
description: Control your volume for each app independently, route apps to different output devices, and apply EQ
author: tiaippoliti

commands.name: finetune
commands.title: FineTune
commands.description: Control your volume for each app independently

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
